overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a frontier settlement courtyard at dusk. The character walks through narrow stone-walled passages, ascends wooden stairs to an upper walkway, and examines the environment containing alien flora and storage containers.

thick wooden structural posts supporting upper walkways
large cylindrical sci-fi storage container with orange color
large cylindrical sci-fi storage container with teal color
planter box containing spiky pink alien flora
wooden staircase with metal railings leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow stone courtyard at ground level, passing colorful storage containers and alien plants in planters. The space is enclosed by white stone walls with wooden structural posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway with overhead netting

reaches upper walkway revealing distant mountains and overhead netting

segments.scene_description: The character ascends wooden stairs to an elevated walkway, revealing overhead netting and distant mountains beyond the settlement. The wooden deck and railings replace the stone courtyard below as the camera moves upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level entry area with sci-fi doorway

events.description: descending stairs back to ground level courtyard
approaching the illuminated sci-fi doorway with metallic frame

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs and approaching the doorway while examining the entry area

empty yellow metal crate frame on the ground

segments.scene_description: Returning to ground level, the character approaches a sci-fi doorway flanked by storage containers and alien plants. A yellow crate frame sits nearby as the character examines the entry area of the stone building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a frontier settlement that shifts from an enclosed ground-level courtyard to an elevated vantage point before returning to a building entrance. It begins by tracking the character through a narrow stone courtyard, passing colorful storage containers and alien plants nestled against white walls and wooden posts. As the character ascends a set of wooden stairs, the perspective rises to an elevated walkway where the stone ground is replaced by wooden decking and railings, revealing overhead netting and distant mountains. The camera then descends back to ground level, shifting its focus toward a sci-fi doorway flanked by more storage containers and alien flora. The movement finally settles as the character approaches the entry area of the stone building, passing a yellow crate frame.
